title: The Rural Runcible Raven
content:
The Rural Runcible Raven,
    who wore a White Wig and flew away
    with the Carpet Broom.
meaning:
"The Rural Runcible Raven" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
